zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Poure於1379年出生在英國奧可福爾布爾頓時，她的父親Thomas Poure33歲，母親Joan Burton29歲。她於1391年與William Wynslowe在英國英格蘭奧可福爾貝布洛可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1443年10月29日在她的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Poure于1379年出生在英国奧可福爾布爾頓时，她的父亲Thomas Poure33岁，母亲Joan Burton29岁。她于1391年与William Wynslowe在英国英格兰奧可福爾貝布洛可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1443年10月29日在她的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Poure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Power  .

variants.name: Power
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): ethnic or habitational name from Old French Pohier, Poer, Middle English Po(u)er, Power ‘native of the Pays de Poix’ (Picardy). This is one of the most common surnames in Ireland.
English: nickname for a poor man, or ironically for a miser, from Middle English povre, poure ‘poor’ (from Latin pauper). Compare Poor .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Poure was born in 1379, in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Poure, was 33 and her mother, Joan Burton, was 29. She married William Wynslowe in 1391, in Begbroke, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 29 October 1443, in her hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Poure est née en 1379, à Bourton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Poure, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Joan Burton, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé William Wynslowe en 1391, à Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 octobre 1443, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Poure 1379 in Bourton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Poure 33 und ihre Mutter Joan Burton 29. Sie hat 1391 in Begbroke, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom William Wynslowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Oktober 1443 im Alter von 64 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Poure è nata il nel 1379 nel Bourton, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Poure, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Joan Burton, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato William Wynslowe nel 1391, nel Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 ottobre 1443, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Poureが1379年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアボウルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Poureは33歳，母Joan Burtonは29歳であった。1391年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベグブロクでWilliam Wynsloweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1443年10月29日に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Poure(이)가 1379년 영국 스퍼드실르 부르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Poure(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Burton(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 베그브로크에서 William Wynslowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1443년 10월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Poure nasceu em 1379, em Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Poure, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Joan Burton, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wynslowe em 1391, em Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1443, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Poure родилась в 1379 г. в местности буртон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Poure было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Burton, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wynslowe в 1391 г. в местности бегброк, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 октября 1443 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Poure nació en 1379, en Bourton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Poure, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Joan Burton, tenía 29 años. Se casó con William Wynslowe en 1391, en Begbroke, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1443, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
